Before and after: sweeping curtain bangs Merchant video Previous page Nural sensors for added intelligence A network of sensors automatically activate the Dyson Supersonic Nural hair dryer’s new features. Helping to make styling easier. Scalp protect mode A Time of Flight sensor automatically adjusts to maintain an optimal target temperature for improved moisture retention. Attachment learning Intelligent attachments come preset with recommended airflow and heat settings – customisable by you, and remembered by the device.² Pause detect An accelerometer detects movement and knows when the machine is put down, deactivating the heater and decreasing airflow. Next page Features Fast, intelligent drying A small but powerful Dyson Hyperdymium motor generates a high-velocity jet of controlled air. Air Multiplier technology Draws in surrounding air to multiply airflow by three times, powerfully projecting controlled air. Intelligent heat control Regulates air temperature to prevent excessive heat damage and protect natural shine. Set your style 3 precise speed settings and four precise heat settings. The fourth button is a cold shot, cooling and setting your styles. ² Activating Scalp protect mode will override last-used heat settings.

product_details_tab_data.Title: Dyson Supersonic Nural™ Hair Dryer - Curly+Coily (Ceramic Pink/Rose Gold)
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Hair Care › Styling Tools › Hair Dryers & Accessories › Hair Dryers
product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Start with clean, wet hair. For a smooth look, use the Gentle air attachment in Scalp protect mode to dry roots before styling. Section hair, use the Styling concentrator and round brush to style a section at a time. Once hair is dry, use Flyaway attachment to create a shiny finish. Enhance your natural curl pattern with two modes using the Wave+Curl diffuser. Separate the prongs from the center of the diffuser for Dome mode to create natural waves or use in Diffuse mode for textured curls.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Helps protect hair from root to tip for long term shine. Prevents over drying for healthy looking, smooth hair¹.
product_details_tab_data.Included Components: Gentle air attachment, Flyaway Attachment, Styling concentrator, Wave + Curl Diffuser, Wide tooth comb
